# Skymavan

Skymavan is an AI engineering studio that builds custom AI agents, workflow automation, and AI software for business operations.

## Primary pages and sections

- Website: https://skymavan.com/
- Services: https://skymavan.com/#services
- Why Skymavan: https://skymavan.com/#why-skymavan
- Industries: https://skymavan.com/#industries
- Process: https://skymavan.com/#process
- Frequently asked questions: https://skymavan.com/#faq
- Contact: https://skymavan.com/#contact

## Services

- AI agents: digital teammates for research, operations, sales support, customer support, and executive reporting with human oversight.
- Workflow automation: CRM, ERP, Slack, email, database integration with approval workflows and human-in-the-loop gates.
- AI product engineering: AI SaaS, internal platforms, knowledge systems, and enterprise AI built for production.

## Contact

Email: hello@skymavan.com
